---
page_title: "akka_route Resource - Akka"
description: |-
  Creates and manages an Akka traffic route.
---

# akka_route

Creates and manages an Akka route. A route maps HTTP path prefixes on a hostname to Akka services,
enabling path-based traffic routing within a project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "akka_route" "api" {
  name     = "api-route"
  project  = akka_project.example.name
  hostname = "api.example.com"

  paths = {
    "/api/v1" = akka_service.v1.name
    "/api/v2" = akka_service.v2.name
  }
}
```

## Schema

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `hostname` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `paths` (Map of String) Map of URL path prefix to service name.

### Optional

- `organization` (String)
- `project` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Import an existing route using `<project>/<name>`:

```shell
terraform import akka_route.api my-project/api-route
```
